channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jeraldine Blackman shares experience living with a heart condition while maintaining an active life
item.description: Jeraldine Blackman recently spoke about her heart condition, giving the public a clearer picture of her current health situation and outlook on life. Despite dealing with a medical issue that could li...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections likely to see tight battles in several key constituencies
item.description: The article discusses how the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections are expected to witness closely fought contests in many constituencies across the state. It points out that while big‑ticket seats ...

item.title: B.C. gangster Jamie Bacon to reside in Edmonton following prison release amid safety concerns
item.description: Jamie Bacon, a notorious figure in British Columbia's criminal underworld, is set to live in Edmonton after his release from prison. Authorities have expressed concerns about the potential for violenc...

item.title: President Tinubu Congratulates 14-Year-Old Ekiti Student Oreofe for Winning 2026 African Spelling Bee Junior Title
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has sent warm congratulations to 14-year-old Adeolu Oluwadamilola Oreofe, a student of St. Lawrence Metropolitan College in Ado Ekiti, Ekiti State, for emerging as the cham...

item.title: Argument Escalates to Shooting at Mall of Louisiana, Leaving One Dead and Multiple Injured
item.description: A shooting erupted at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge on Thursday after an argument between two groups in the food court, resulting in one death and at least five injuries. Witnesses reported fra...

item.title: Billionaire Rick Jackson shakes up Georgia governor’s race with record self‑funded ad blitz
item.description: Billionaire healthcare executive Rick Jackson has injected more than 50 million dollars of his own money into the already crowded Georgia Republican gubernatorial primary, rapidly transforming from a ...

item.title: Balochistan's New Research Centre to Tackle Extremism and Support Youth
item.description: Balochistan's Chief Minister Sarfraz Bugti recently inaugurated the province's first research centre aimed at countering rising extremism. The Balochistan Centre of Excellence on Countering Violent Ex...

item.title: Ayaz Sadiq Emphasizes Diplomacy and International Law for Regional Stability

item.title: Rebel Wilson and Sacha Baron Cohen ongoing public dispute over The Brothers Grimsby film set behaviour
item.description: The long-running public disagreement between Australian actress Rebel Wilson and British comedian Sacha Baron Cohen continues into 2026, stemming from their work together on the 2016 comedy movie The ...

item.title: Lahore High Court rules fathers remain liable for child maintenance during ongoing trials
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has ruled that a father cannot avoid paying maintenance to his minor child while a family case is under trial, even if earlier proceedings are reopened. Justice Raheel Kamr...

item.title: Michael Jackson Biopic: The Cast and Their Remarkable Transformations Into Real-Life Figures
item.description: The upcoming film 'Michael', which chronicles the life and early career of Michael Jackson, is creating buzz not only for its storyline but for its casting choices and the striking resemblance between...

item.title: Carney indicates progress on U.S.-Canada trade issues possible with mutual concessions
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney stated that several U.S. trade irritants, including provincial bans on American liquor, can be addressed quickly if Canada’s concerns are also resolved. The discussions are ...

item.title: India remains in contact with family of ex-naval officer detained in Qatar
item.description: The article reports that India is in touch with the family of a former Indian naval officer who has been detained in Qatar. The case is part of a wider and sensitive diplomatic matter involving former...

item.title: Islamabad Court Grants Bail to 11 Suspects in Khamenei Protest Case
item.description: On Thursday, the Anti-Terrorism Court (ATC) in Islamabad granted post-arrest bail to 11 individuals who were arrested during protests following the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. The co...

item.title: Dimsum workers win wage increase and service charge share after strike
item.description: After six days of striking, workers from Dimsum restaurants have successfully negotiated for higher wages and a share of the service charge. The labor action, which took place in several branches, foc...

item.title: Space dominance critical for India's future defence strategy, says CDS and DRDO chief
item.description: India's defence leaders have underscored the strategic importance of space in modern warfare, with Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) General Anil Chauhan highlighting that without dominance in space, India...

item.title: Australia increases fuel reserves amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Australia has significantly increased its fuel reserves, now holding 46 days' worth of petrol, which is 10 days more than prior to the outbreak of conflict in the Middle East. The war, which led to di...

item.title: US rejects nuclear option as naval tensions with Iran escalate in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States has intensified its military posture in the Strait of Hormuz as tensions with Iran continue, with President Donald Trump clearly ruling out the use of nuclear weapons while still sig...

item.title: New Research Reveals the Age of the Twelve Apostles and Their Formation Process
item.description: The Twelve Apostles, iconic limestone stacks along Victoria’s Great Ocean Road, have long fascinated visitors and scientists alike. A recent study published in the Australian Journal of Earth Sciences...

item.title: Nyashinski’s Wife Zia Shares Her Journey from Gikomba Hawker to Fashion Entrepreneur
item.description: Nyashinski's wife, Zia Bett, has shared the inspiring story of how she began her fashion journey from very humble beginnings. Back when she was in university, about 13 years ago, she started a small s...
